Here is a concrete, issue-by-issue breakdown of the reuse opportunities found.

## Issue 1: `aiohttp.ClientSession()` created fresh in every function

aiohttp's own docs explicitly warn against creating a session per request — it carries connection pool overhead and doesn't allow keep-alive reuse. More concretely, `congress_debate` creates **three separate sessions** in a single function call: one to fetch thread messages (line 116), one to POST to the congress API (line 137), and one to po...(truncated)
